title: Counselor Enrollment & Delivery Checklist
subtitle: Coaching · IELTS General Training · Regular batch with books
footerTagline: Future Link Consultants | 25+ Years in Study Abroad & Test Prep | IELTS · PTE · GRE · GMAT · German · French · Spoken English
policyBanner: General Training module only (not Academic). Confirm migration / PR pathway before enrollment. Books included — issue on Day 1. Exam fee is separate (paid to IDP IELTS India on ieltsidpindia.com). Never guarantee a band score.

items.title: Diagnostic completed (or prior IELTS GT score reviewed)
items.note: Record L/R/W/S. Map target to CLB if Canada.

items.title: General Training module confirmed (not Academic)
items.note: Canada PR, citizenship, UK settlement — GT prep differs from Academic.

items.title: Destination country / visa pathway documented on file
Target band and timeline agreed in writing
Enrollment agreement signed; course fee collected
Trainer briefed on CLB / IRCC target if Canada lead
GT Reading practice — workplace / everyday texts
Two consecutive mocks within 0.5 of target
Test day checklist shared — GT module on confirmation
TRF collected; scores uploaded to client file
Visa / immigration team notified when CLB target met
Retake or booster if below pathway minimum
